task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output to Profile in config.rs
steps.instruction:
Add field `pub cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` to struct Profile at src/config.rs:44 (after cost_per_mtok_input), with serde default and documentation comment like the input field.

steps.description: Add cost field to UiEvent::TokenStats in tui/mod.rs
steps.instruction: Add field `total_cost_usd: f64` to enum variant TokenStats at src/tui/mod.rs around line 110 (find exact location with find_symbol TokenStats).

steps.description: Calculate and send cost in run_tui
steps.instruction:
In src/agent.rs after line 282 (where tokens are incremented), add a `total_cost` variable and calculate cost using: (input_tokens * cost_per_mtok_input / 1_000_000.0) + (output_tokens * cost_per_mtok_output / 1_000_000.0). Send this in UiEvent::TokenStats at lines 287-294 and 391-397.
[index: `UiEvent` at line 535 in src/callgraph.rs]
[index: `UiEvent` at line 56 in src/tui/mod.rs]

steps.description: Add cost display to config_view in tui
steps.instruction: In src/tui/config_view.rs, add UI to display and edit cost_per_mtok_input and cost_per_mtok_output fields (similar to how model and context_tokens are displayed).
